author: Maya Chen
summary: Internal beta expanded to 240 employees. Search click-through improved after relevance tuning, but enterprise corpus expansion is waiting on permission-aware indexing review.

author: Maya Chen
summary: AI Platform and API Services agreed on a documentation evaluation set. Weekly quality scorecards now track relevance, latency, and unanswered queries.

author: Noah Williams
summary: Migration Wave 2 is critical. The customer API cutover rehearsal exceeded the maintenance window by 47 minutes, requiring a two-wave sequence and temporary dual-run budget.

author: Noah Williams
summary: Twenty-seven of 43 workloads are running in the new cloud landing zone. Analytics workloads are stable; the customer API tier remains the schedule driver.

author: Priya Singh
summary: Workforce SSO pilot reached 92 percent enrollment with no severity-one incidents. API Services is completing adapters for two remaining legacy integrations.

author: Elena Rodriguez
summary: Internal beta crash-free sessions reached 99.6 percent. Mobile is validating Android push telemetry and preparing a 500-customer design partner release.

author: Jordan Patel
summary: Query performance improved 34 percent in staging. Production backfill testing remains at risk until Cloud Infrastructure reserves an isolated compute pool.

author: Jordan Patel
summary: Product dashboards completed parallel validation. Finance dashboards identified three metric definition mismatches that are now under reconciliation.
